assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Qdrant Cloud account and free cluster, then run the official Python Cloud Quickstart through first semantic search.

first_success.outcome: The official menu-item dataset is loaded with free Cloud Inference and the published semantic search returns ranked menu items.
first_success.observable_signal: The Python program prints up to five menu items with name, score, description, and price.

route_selection.surface: Qdrant Cloud free cluster and Python Cloud Quickstart
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Email, Google, or GitHub registration then free cluster and Python search
candidates.reason: Signup method and whether payment details are required before free cluster creation remain incompletely evidenced.

candidates.name: Provider and region choice for free cluster
candidates.reason: Supported provider and region defaults are not fixed as a universal shortest path.

required_path.action: Register for a Qdrant Cloud account.

required_fields.label: Email authorization code when using email

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the Qdrant Cloud console.

required_path.action: Create a Free Cluster and copy the API key.
required_path.observable_result: A free cluster is created and an API key is shown once.
The client package is available locally.

required_path.action: Connect with cloud_inference, load the sample dataset, and run the published semantic search.

required_fields.label: Cluster URL and API key in client config

required_path.observable_result: Semantic search results for vegetarian dishes are printed.

prerequisites.description: A Qdrant Cloud account is required before free cluster creation.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email authorization code delivery for the email signup route.

platform_outcomes.description: Qdrant Cloud creates the free cluster and issues an API key.

excluded.item: Reading pricing pages beyond free-cluster creation
excluded.reason: Not required to complete the quickstart search terminal.

sources.title: Setting up a Qdrant Cloud Account

uncertainties.question: Must a developer provide payment details before creating the Free Tier cluster?
uncertainties.impact: Would add an external payment gate and change lexicographic ranking.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official billing requirement statement or fresh-account walkthrough through Create Free Cluster.

uncertainties.question: Which provider and region should be treated as the universal free-cluster default?
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Current console defaults for new free clusters.
